name: Discover Essence of Vietnam from North to South by Luxury Train 8 days
duration: Places:Hanoi - Ninh Binh - Quang Binh - Hue - Hoi An - Phan Thiet - Ho Chi Minh City
highlights: Sail through the emerald waterways of Trang An and uncover the ancient capital of Hoa Lu in Ninh Binh.
Venture into the majestic caves of Phong Nha–Ke Bang National Park, a UNESCO World Heritage treasure.
Immerse yourself in the imperial legacy of Hue and the lantern-lit beauty of Hoi An’s Ancient Town.
Savor world-class cuisine and bespoke onboard service as Vietnam’s stunning countryside unfolds outside your window.

itinerary.title: Hanoi Capital – Welcome on Board
itinerary.description: As the afternoon light softens over Hanoi, a feeling of excitement fills the air—your luxurious rail adventure is about to begin. At around 16:30 p.m., your private driver will pick you up from your hotel for a comfortable transfer to Gia Lam Station. Upon arrival, you’ll be warmly welcomed and escorted to the VIP lounge, where a team of attentive staff will assist you with check-in, ensuring a smooth and elegant start to your journey. Take a moment to settle into your surroundings and appreciate the refined details of your environment. As the bustle of the city fades, allow yourself to unwind...

itinerary.title: Ninh Binh – Explore the First Kingdom of Vietnam
itinerary.description: Awaken to the tranquil beauty of Ninh Binh as the first light of dawn bathes the landscape in soft gold. Enjoy a sumptuous breakfast served in the elegant dining car of your luxury train, where every dish reflects refined culinary artistry - setting the perfect tone for the day ahead. After breakfast, your journey continues from the comfort of the train to the serene embrace of Trang An, often described as “Ha Long Bay on land.” Here, step aboard a traditional sampan boat and drift along emerald-green waterways framed by towering limestone cliffs and lush vegetation. As you glide through myste...

itinerary.title: Quang Binh – A Soft Adventure in Jungle and Caves
itinerary.description:
Morning

Awaken gently to the rhythmic sway of the train as the landscapes of Central Vietnam unfold beyond your window. Enjoy a leisurely breakfast on board, savoring both the anticipation of the day’s adventure and the tranquil beauty that surrounds you. Disembark in Quang Binh, a province celebrated for its awe-inspiring natural landscapes. Begin your exploration of Phong Nha–Ke Bang National Park, a UNESCO World Heritage Site famed for its ancient limestone mountains, lush jungles, and vast cave systems. Step aboard a boat along the Son River, gliding peacefully through the emerald waters ...

itinerary.title: Hue City Tour - A Glimpse into Vietnam’s Imperial Past
itinerary.description:
Morning

Begin your day with a nostalgic rickshaw ride through the peaceful streets of Hue. The cool morning air carries the scent of dew, and the ancient moss-covered gates and weathered walls seem to whisper tales from a glorious past. Arrive at the Imperial Citadel, once the beating heart of the Nguyen Dynasty, where towering ramparts, stately palaces, and sacred shrines evoke the grandeur of Vietnam’s imperial heritage. As you wander through tranquil gardens and admire precious relics - from the emperor’s throne to his resplendent robes - the past comes alive in the gentle glow of the morn...

itinerary.title: Hoi An – Ancient Merchant Hub of Southeast Asia
itinerary.description:
Morning

Begin your day with a captivating rail journey from historic Hue, departing in the gentle cool of the morning. Relax in the comfort of your carriage as the train glides through tranquil countryside, offering glimpses of emerald hills, glistening lagoons, and charming coastal villages. Upon arrival in Hoi An, unwind amidst lush rice fields, where the serene landscape sets the perfect tone for the day. Savor a cup of freshly brewed Vietnamese coffee, rich in aroma and flavor, as you soak in the peaceful rural ambiance. Your adventure continues with an exhilarating jeep ride to Au Lac Wo...

itinerary.title: Phu Yen – A Voyage into Coastal Serenity
itinerary.description:
Morning

Awaken to a tranquil morning and enjoy a peaceful breakfast on board as the train glides through the gentle landscapes of Phu Yen - a province where tradition, simplicity, and natural beauty harmoniously blend. Your first stop is Mang Lang Church, one of Vietnam’s oldest and most striking examples of Gothic architecture. With its elegant spires and weathered façade, this century-old church stands as a quiet testament to both faith and endurance. Beneath its graceful arches, you can feel the timeless dialogue between East and West, as soft light filters through stained glass, illuminat...

itinerary.title: Phan Thiet – Explore the Ancient Cham Culture
itinerary.description:
Morning

Begin your morning with a scenic journey to the tranquil Ta Cu Mountain, a revered spiritual landmark in Binh Thuan Province. Dating back to the 18th century under the reign of King Tu Duc, this sacred mountain has long been a pilgrimage site for Vietnamese Buddhists. Ascend to the summit to discover the Linh Son Truong Tho Pagoda, an architectural gem offering panoramic views of Phan Thiet and its surrounding countryside. The serenity of the mountaintop and the gentle mountain breeze provide a perfect start to your day. Continue your exploration with a unique culinary and cultural ex...

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City – Return to Modern Life – Farewell
itinerary.description: As dawn breaks, your luxury train arrives at Saigon Station around 5:00, marking the end of an extraordinary journey through Vietnam’s diverse landscapes and rich heritage. Begin your morning with a leisurely onboard breakfast, served until 8:30. Enjoy your final moments in the elegant dining car, reflecting on the unforgettable experiences and memories gathered along the way. At 9:00, check-out procedures begin. Depending on your flight schedule, you will be transferred to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City for a short rest or directly to Tan Son Nhat International Airport for your departure flig...

included: Dining options include breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Meals are freshly prepared on the train using the finest local ingredients available and enjoy authentic dining experiences at local restaurants during excursions.
Complimentary beverages as per drink list
Cabin attendant service, private airport/hotel transfers, and one complimentary spa treatment
Excursions with English-speaking guides and entrance fees
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
